_instructions: Generate a new country JSON by following this schema exactly. Use ~100 trips per country for comprehensive coverage. stops[].name must be Google Places searchable (add country suffix when ambiguous, e.g. 'Toledo, Spain'). cover_search_query must be specific enough to return a great photo (e.g. 'Amalfi Coast cliffs Italy' not 'Italy'). duration_days and distance_km should be realistic driving estimates. Group trips by region for a good filter UX. Each trip should have 4-8 stops.

trips.name: Human Readable Trip Name
trips.description: 2-3 sentence evocative description of the road trip.
trips.cover_search_query: Landmark or region + country, specific enough for a great photo
